testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Dashboard: Page Structure loads dashboard page
OpenSparrow – Dashboard: Page Structure has dashboard section container
OpenSparrow – Dashboard: Page Structure has sidebar menu
OpenSparrow – Dashboard: Page Structure has notifications bell
OpenSparrow – Dashboard: Page Structure header contains user avatar button
OpenSparrow – Dashboard: Widget Loading dashboard section transitions out of loading state
testcase.classname: dashboard section transitions out of loading state

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Dashboard: Widget Loading renders widgets or error after load
testcase.classname: renders widgets or error after load

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Dashboard: Widget Loading if widgets configured: each has a title
testcase.classname: if widgets configured: each has a title

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Dashboard: Widget Loading if widgets configured: widget has data-w attribute
testcase.classname: if widgets configured: widget has data-w attribute

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Dashboard: Widget Loading if error: .dash-error message is not empty
testcase.classname: if error: .dash-error message is not empty

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Dashboard: Navigation sidebar menu has at least one link
testcase.classname: sidebar menu has at least one link

testcase.classname: clicking first table link navigates to grid

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Dashboard: Navigation sidebar toggle button exists
OpenSparrow – Dashboard: Mobile loads on mobile viewport
